  [user_task_description] # Requirements Document for 'RestaurantReservation' Web Application  ## 1. Objective Develop a comprehensive web application named 'RestaurantReservation' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse restaurant menus, make table reservations, write reviews, check waitlist status, and manage their dining history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.  ## 2. Language The required development language for the 'RestaurantReservation' application is Python.  ## 3. Page Design  The 'RestaurantReservation' web application will consist of the following nine pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: Restaurant Dashboard - **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured dishes, upcoming reservations, and navigation to other functionalities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.   - **ID: make-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to reservation page.   - **ID: view-menu-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to menu page.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to refresh dashboard.   - **ID: my-reservations-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reservations page.   - **ID: my-reviews-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reviews page.   - **ID: waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to waitlist page.   - **ID: profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to user profile page.  ### 2. Menu Page - **Page Title**: Restaurant Menu - **Overview**: A page displaying the restaurant menu with categories and filtering. - **Elements**:   - **ID: menu-page** - Type: Div - Container for the menu page.   - **ID: menu-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying dish cards with image, name, price, description.   - **ID: view-dish-button-{dish_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view dish details (each card has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 3. Dish Details Page - **Page Title**: Dish Details - **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific dish. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dish-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dish details page.   - **ID: dish-name** - Type: H1 - Display dish name.   - **ID: dish-price** - Type: Div - Display dish price.   - **ID: back-to-menu** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to menu.  ### 4. Make Reservation Page - **Page Title**: Make Reservation - **Overview**: A page for users to make a table reservation. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reservation-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservation page.   - **ID: guest-name** - Type: Input - Field to input guest name.   - **ID: party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size (1-10).   - **ID: reservation-date** - Type: Input (date) - Field to select reservation date.   - **ID: submit-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit reservation.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 5. My Reservations Page - **Page Title**: My Reservations - **Overview**: A page displaying all reservations made by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: my-reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my reservations page.   - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reservations with date, time, party size, status.   - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each upcoming reservation has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 6. Waitlist Page - **Page Title**: Waitlist - **Overview**: A page for users to join the waitlist and check their position. - **Elements**:   - **ID: waitlist-page** - Type: Div - Container for the waitlist page.   - **ID: waitlist-party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size.   - **ID: join-waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to join waitlist.   - **ID: user-position** - Type: Div - Display user's current position in waitlist.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 7. My Reviews Page - **Page Title**: My Reviews - **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.   - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with dish name, rating, review text.   - **ID: write-new-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Write Review Page - **Page Title**: Write Review - **Overview**: A page for users to write a review for a dish. - **Elements**:   - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.   - **ID: select-dish** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select dish to review.   - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).   - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.   - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.   - **ID: back-to-reviews** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to my reviews.  ### 9. User Profile Page - **Page Title**: My Profile - **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information. - **Elements**:   - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.   - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).   - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.   - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'RestaurantReservation' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. User Data - **File Name**: `users.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   username|email|phone|full_name   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   john_diner|john@example.com|555-1234|John Diner   jane_food|jane@example.com|555-5678|Jane Foodie   ```  ### 2. Menu Items Data - **File Name**: `menu.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   dish_id|name|category|price|description|ingredients|dietary|avg_rating   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Caesar Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh romaine lettuce with caesar dressing|Romaine,Parmesan,Croutons,Dressing|Vegetarian|4.5   2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh Atlantic salmon grilled to perfection|Salmon,Lemon,Herbs,Vegetables|Gluten-Free|4.8   3|Chocolate Lava Cake|Desserts|7.99|Warm chocolate cake with molten center|Chocolate,Flour,Eggs,Sugar|Vegetarian|4.9   4|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium Japanese green tea|Green Tea Leaves,Water|Vegan|4.6   ```  ### 3. Reservations Data - **File Name**: `reservations.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   reservation_id|username|guest_name|phone|email|party_size|date|time|special_requests|status   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|4|2024-12-01|18:00|Window seat please|Upcoming   2|jane_food|Jane Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed   3|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming   ```  ### 4. Waitlist Data - **File Name**: `waitlist.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   waitlist_id|username|party_size|join_time|status   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:30:00|Active   2|jane_food|4|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active   ```  ### 5. Reviews Data - **File Name**: `reviews.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   review_id|username|dish_id|rating|review_text|review_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|jane_food|2|5|Best salmon I've ever had!|2024-11-21   2|john_diner|3|5|Absolutely divine dessert!|2024-11-20   3|jane_food|1|4|Fresh and tasty, but dressing could be creamier.|2024-11-19   ```  All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.

[Tool_Request] SystemArchitect: write_text_file({"filename": "design_spec.md", "content": "# RestaurantReservation Application Specification\n\n## Overview\nThis document specifies the design and implementation details for the RestaurantReservation web application using Flask. It covers the application routes, HTTP methods, template files, context variables, frontend element IDs, and the data files format and structure.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Routes and HTTP Methods\nAll form submissions use the POST method.\n\n| Route                 | HTTP Method | Description                               | Template                 |\n|-----------------------|-------------|-------------------------------------------|--------------------------|\n| `/dashboard`          | GET         | Dashboard page displaying upcoming reservations and navigation buttons | `templates/dashboard.html` |\n| `/menu`               | GET         | Restaurant menu page with filtering        | `templates/menu.html`         |\n| `/menu/<int:dish_id>` | GET         | Dish details page                          | `templates/dish_details.html`  |\n| `/make_reservation`   | GET, POST   | Reservation form page and submission      | `templates/make_reservation.html` |\n| `/my_reservations`    | GET         | List of user's reservations                | `templates/my_reservations.html` |\n| `/cancel_reservation` | POST        | Cancel a reservation                        | No template (redirects)          |\n| `/waitlist`           | GET, POST   | Waitlist page, join and view position      | `templates/waitlist.html`        |\n| `/my_reviews`         | GET         | User's reviews page                         | `templates/my_reviews.html`      |\n| `/write_review`       | GET, POST   | Write a new review page and submission     | `templates/write_review.html`    |\n| `/profile`            | GET, POST   | Profile page to view and update info       | `templates/profile.html`         |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Template Files and Context Variables\n\n### dashboard.html\n- **Title:** Dashboard\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `dashboard-page` (container div)\n  - `make-reservation-button` (button): navigates to `/make_reservation`\n  - `view-menu-button` (button): navigates to `/menu`\n  - `waitlist-button` (button): navigates to `/waitlist`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): refresh current dashboard page\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `username` (string): current user's name\n  - `upcoming_reservations` (list of dicts): each dict contains:\n    - `reservation_id` (int)\n    - `guest_name` (string)\n    - `party_size` (int)\n    - `date` (string, 'YYYY-MM-DD')\n    - `time` (string, 'HH:MM')\n    - `special_requests` (string)\n    - `status` (string)\n- **Flask url_for usage example:**\n  - Navigation buttons call `url_for('route_name')`\n\n### menu.html\n- **Title:** Restaurant Menu\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `menu-page` (container div)\n  - For each menu item:\n    - `dish-name-{dish_id}`: dish name (text)\n    - `dish-category-{dish_id}`: category (text)\n    - `dish-price-{dish_id}`: price (text)\n    - `view-details-button-{dish_id}`: button to `/menu/<dish_id>`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): navigates back to `/dashboard`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `menus` (list of dicts):\n    - `dish_id` (int)\n    - `name` (string)\n    - `category` (string)\n    - `price` (float)\n    - `description` (string)\n\n### dish_details.html\n- **Title:** Dish Details\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `dish-details-page` (container div)\n  - `dish-name` (H1): dish name\n  - `dish-price` (div): dish price\n  - `dish-description` (div): dish description\n  - `back-to-menu` (button): navigates back to `/menu`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `dish` (dict):\n    - `dish_id` (int)\n    - `name` (string)\n    - `category` (string)\n    - `price` (float)\n    - `description` (string)\n\n### make_reservation.html\n- **Title:** Make a Reservation\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `make-reservation-page` (container div)\n  - `guest-name-input` (input text)\n  - `phone-input` (input text)\n  - `email-input` (input text)\n  - `party-size-input` (select dropdown)\n  - `reservation-date` (input date picker)\n  - `reservation-time` (input time picker)\n  - `special-requests-input` (textarea)\n  - `submit-reservation-button` (button): submits form POST\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): navigates back to `/dashboard`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - None (form fields are empty or prefilled if user data is known)\n\n### my_reservations.html\n- **Title:** My Reservations\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `my-reservations-page` (container div)\n  - For each reservation:\n    - `reservation-{reservation_id}` (div) container\n    - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` (button): posts to cancel\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): back to `/dashboard`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `reservations` (list of dicts):\n    - `reservation_id` (int)\n    - `guest_name` (string)\n    - `party_size` (int)\n    - `date` (string)\n    - `time` (string)\n    - `status` (string)\n\n### waitlist.html\n- **Title:** Waitlist\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `waitlist-page` (container div)\n  - `party-size-dropdown` (select) to join waitlist\n  - `join-waitlist-button` (button) to submit\n  - `user-position` (div) showing user's current position\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `waitlist_position` (int or None if not in list)\n\n### my_reviews.html\n- **Title:** My Reviews\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `my-reviews-page` (container div)\n  - For each review:\n    - `review-{review_id}` (div) container\n    - show dish name, rating stars, review text\n  - `write-new-review-button` (button): navigates to `/write_review`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `reviews` (list of dict):\n    - `review_id` (int)\n    - `dish_name` (string)\n    - `rating` (int)\n    - `review_text` (string)\n\n### write_review.html\n- **Title:** Write a Review\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `write-review-page` (container div)\n  - `dish-dropdown` (select) to select dish\n  - `rating-input` (select dropdown stars 1-5)\n  - `review-text-input` (textarea)\n  - `submit-review-button` (button) submits form\n  - `back-to-my-reviews` (button)\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `menus` (list of dict): list of dishes for dropdown\n\n### profile.html\n- **Title:** My Profile\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `profile-page` (container div)\n  - `profile-email` (input text)\n  - `profile-phone` (input text)\n  - `save-profile-button` (button)\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `user_profile` (dict):\n    - `email` (string)\n    - `phone` (string)\n\n---\n\n## 3. Data Files\n\nData files stored in `data/` directory. All use pipe (`|`) delimiter.\n\n### 3.1 menu.txt\n- Fields:\n  - dish_id (int)\n  - name (string)\n  - category (string)\n  - price (float)\n  - description (string)\n- Example rows:\n  - `1|Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh lettuce`\n  - `2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh salmon grilled to perfection`\n  - `3|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium tea`\n\n### 3.2 reservations.txt\n- Fields:\n  - reservation_id (int)\n  - username (string)\n  - guest_name (string)\n  - phone (string)\n  - email (string)\n  - party_size (int)\n  - date (YYYY-MM-DD)\n  - time (HH:MM)\n  - special_requests (string)\n  - status (string) [Upcoming, Completed, Cancelled]\n- Example:\n  - `1|john_diner|John Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed`\n  - `2|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming`\n\n### 3.3 waitlist.txt\n- Fields:\n  - waitlist_id (int)\n  - username (string)\n  - party_size (int)\n  - datetime (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)\n  - status (string) [Active, Removed]\n- Example:\n  - `1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active`\n\n### 3.4 reviews.txt\n- Fields:\n  - review_id (int)\n  - username (string)\n  - dish_id (int)\n  - rating (int, 1-5 stars)\n  - review_text (string)\n  - date (YYYY-MM-DD)\n- Example:\n  - `1|john_diner|2|5|Excellent Salmon dish!|2024-11-21`\n\n---\n\n## 4. Notes\n- All element IDs must be placed exactly as specified for frontend interaction consistency.\n- Context variables and their structures are given for each template to enable frontend rendering and for backend to provide correct context.\n- All routes must be named in the Flask app (functions names), and URLs generated via `url_for`.\n- POST requests occur for form submissions such as making/cancelling reservations, joining waitlist, submitting reviews, and editing profile.\n- The specification supports full implementation and testing independently of the frontend team."})

  [user_task_description] # Requirements Document for 'RestaurantReservation' Web Application  ## 1. Objective Develop a comprehensive web application named 'RestaurantReservation' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse restaurant menus, make table reservations, write reviews, check waitlist status, and manage their dining history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.  ## 2. Language The required development language for the 'RestaurantReservation' application is Python.  ## 3. Page Design  The 'RestaurantReservation' web application will consist of the following nine pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: Restaurant Dashboard - **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured dishes, upcoming reservations, and navigation to other functionalities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.   - **ID: make-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to reservation page.   - **ID: view-menu-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to menu page.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to refresh dashboard.   - **ID: my-reservations-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reservations page.   - **ID: my-reviews-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reviews page.   - **ID: waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to waitlist page.   - **ID: profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to user profile page.  ### 2. Menu Page - **Page Title**: Restaurant Menu - **Overview**: A page displaying the restaurant menu with categories and filtering. - **Elements**:   - **ID: menu-page** - Type: Div - Container for the menu page.   - **ID: menu-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying dish cards with image, name, price, description.   - **ID: view-dish-button-{dish_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view dish details (each card has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 3. Dish Details Page - **Page Title**: Dish Details - **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific dish. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dish-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dish details page.   - **ID: dish-name** - Type: H1 - Display dish name.   - **ID: dish-price** - Type: Div - Display dish price.   - **ID: back-to-menu** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to menu.  ### 4. Make Reservation Page - **Page Title**: Make Reservation - **Overview**: A page for users to make a table reservation. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reservation-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservation page.   - **ID: guest-name** - Type: Input - Field to input guest name.   - **ID: party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size (1-10).   - **ID: reservation-date** - Type: Input (date) - Field to select reservation date.   - **ID: submit-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit reservation.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 5. My Reservations Page - **Page Title**: My Reservations - **Overview**: A page displaying all reservations made by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: my-reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my reservations page.   - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reservations with date, time, party size, status.   - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each upcoming reservation has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 6. Waitlist Page - **Page Title**: Waitlist - **Overview**: A page for users to join the waitlist and check their position. - **Elements**:   - **ID: waitlist-page** - Type: Div - Container for the waitlist page.   - **ID: waitlist-party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size.   - **ID: join-waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to join waitlist.   - **ID: user-position** - Type: Div - Display user's current position in waitlist.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 7. My Reviews Page - **Page Title**: My Reviews - **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.   - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with dish name, rating, review text.   - **ID: write-new-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Write Review Page - **Page Title**: Write Review - **Overview**: A page for users to write a review for a dish. - **Elements**:   - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.   - **ID: select-dish** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select dish to review.   - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).   - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.   - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.   - **ID: back-to-reviews** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to my reviews.  ### 9. User Profile Page - **Page Title**: My Profile - **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information. - **Elements**:   - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.   - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).   - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.   - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'RestaurantReservation' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. User Data - **File Name**: `users.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   username|email|phone|full_name   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   john_diner|john@example.com|555-1234|John Diner   jane_food|jane@example.com|555-5678|Jane Foodie   ```  ### 2. Reservations Data - **File Name**: `reservations.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   reservation_id|username|guest_name|phone|email|party_size|date|time|special_requests|status   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|4|2024-12-01|18:00|Window seat please|Upcoming   2|jane_food|Jane Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed   3|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming   ```  ### 4. Waitlist Data - **File Name**: `waitlist.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   waitlist_id|username|party_size|join_time|status   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:30:00|Active   2|jane_food|4|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active   ```  ### 5. Reviews Data - **File Name**: `reviews.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   review_id|username|dish_id|rating|review_text|review_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|jane_food|2|5|Best salmon I've ever had!|2024-11-21   2|john_diner|3|5|Absolutely divine dessert!|2024-11-20   3|jane_food|1|4|Fresh and tasty, but dressing could be creamier.|2024-11-19   ```  All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.
  [design_spec.md] # RestaurantReservation Application Specification  ## Overview This document specifies the design and implementation details for the RestaurantReservation web application using Flask. It covers the application routes, HTTP methods, template files, context variables, frontend element IDs, and the data files format and structure.  ---  ## 1. Routes and HTTP Methods All form submissions use the POST method.  | Route                 | HTTP Method | Description                               | Template                 | |-----------------------|-------------|-------------------------------------------|--------------------------| | `/dashboard`          | GET         | Dashboard page displaying upcoming reservations and navigation buttons | `templates/dashboard.html` | | `/menu`               | GET         | Restaurant menu page with filtering        | `templates/menu.html`         | | `/menu/<int:dish_id>` | GET         | Dish details page                          | `templates/dish_details.html`  | | `/make_reservation`   | GET, POST   | Reservation form page and submission      | `templates/make_reservation.html` | | `/my_reservations`    | GET         | List of user's reservations                | `templates/my_reservations.html` | | `/cancel_reservation` | POST        | Cancel a reservation                        | No template (redirects)          | | `/waitlist`           | GET, POST   | Waitlist page, join and view position      | `templates/waitlist.html`        | | `/my_reviews`         | GET         | User's reviews page                         | `templates/my_reviews.html`      | | `/write_review`       | GET, POST   | Write a new review page and submission     | `templates/write_review.html`    | | `/profile`            | GET, POST   | Profile page to view and update info       | `templates/profile.html`         |  ---  ## 2. Template Files and Context Variables  ### dashboard.html - **Title:** Dashboard - **Element IDs:**   - `dashboard-page` (container div)   - `make-reservation-button` (button): navigates to `/make_reservation`   - `view-menu-button` (button): navigates to `/menu`   - `waitlist-button` (button): navigates to `/waitlist`   - `back-to-dashboard` (button): refresh current dashboard page - **Context Variables:**   - `username` (string): current user's name   - `upcoming_reservations` (list of dicts): each dict contains:     - `reservation_id` (int)     - `guest_name` (string)     - `party_size` (int)     - `date` (string, 'YYYY-MM-DD')     - `time` (string, 'HH:MM')     - `special_requests` (string)     - `status` (string) - **Flask url_for usage example:**   - Navigation buttons call `url_for('route_name')`  ### menu.html - **Title:** Restaurant Menu - **Element IDs:**   - `menu-page` (container div)   - For each menu item:     - `dish-name-{dish_id}`: dish name (text)     - `dish-category-{dish_id}`: category (text)     - `dish-price-{dish_id}`: price (text)     - `view-details-button-{dish_id}`: button to `/menu/<dish_id>`   - `back-to-dashboard` (button): navigates back to `/dashboard` - **Context Variables:**   - `menus` (list of dicts):     - `dish_id` (int)     - `name` (string)     - `category` (string)     - `price` (float)     - `description` (string)  ### dish_details.html - **Title:** Dish Details - **Element IDs:**   - `dish-details-page` (container div)   - `dish-name` (H1): dish name   - `dish-price` (div): dish price   - `dish-description` (div): dish description   - `back-to-menu` (button): navigates back to `/menu` - **Context Variables:**   - `dish` (dict):     - `dish_id` (int)     - `name` (string)     - `category` (string)     - `price` (float)     - `description` (string)  ### make_reservation.html - **Title:** Make a Reservation - **Element IDs:**   - `make-reservation-page` (container div)   - `guest-name-input` (input text)   - `phone-input` (input text)   - `email-input` (input text)   - `party-size-input` (select dropdown)   - `reservation-date` (input date picker)   - `reservation-time` (input time picker)   - `special-requests-input` (textarea)   - `submit-reservation-button` (button): submits form POST   - `back-to-dashboard` (button): navigates back to `/dashboard` - **Context Variables:**   - None (form fields are empty or prefilled if user data is known)  ### my_reservations.html - **Title:** My Reservations - **Element IDs:**   - `my-reservations-page` (container div)   - For each reservation:     - `reservation-{reservation_id}` (div) container     - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` (button): posts to cancel   - `back-to-dashboard` (button): back to `/dashboard` - **Context Variables:**   - `reservations` (list of dicts):     - `reservation_id` (int)     - `guest_name` (string)     - `party_size` (int)     - `date` (string)     - `time` (string)     - `status` (string)  ### waitlist.html - **Title:** Waitlist - **Element IDs:**   - `waitlist-page` (container div)   - `party-size-dropdown` (select) to join waitlist   - `join-waitlist-button` (button) to submit   - `user-position` (div) showing user's current position   - `back-to-dashboard` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `waitlist_position` (int or None if not in list)  ### my_reviews.html - **Title:** My Reviews - **Element IDs:**   - `my-reviews-page` (container div)   - For each review:     - `review-{review_id}` (div) container     - show dish name, rating stars, review text   - `write-new-review-button` (button): navigates to `/write_review`   - `back-to-dashboard` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `reviews` (list of dict):     - `review_id` (int)     - `dish_name` (string)     - `rating` (int)     - `review_text` (string)  ### write_review.html - **Title:** Write a Review - **Element IDs:**   - `write-review-page` (container div)   - `dish-dropdown` (select) to select dish   - `rating-input` (select dropdown stars 1-5)   - `review-text-input` (textarea)   - `submit-review-button` (button) submits form   - `back-to-my-reviews` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `menus` (list of dict): list of dishes for dropdown  ### profile.html - **Title:** My Profile - **Element IDs:**   - `profile-page` (container div)   - `profile-email` (input text)   - `profile-phone` (input text)   - `save-profile-button` (button)   - `back-to-dashboard` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `user_profile` (dict):     - `email` (string)     - `phone` (string)  ---  ## 3. Data Files  Data files stored in `data/` directory. All use pipe (`|`) delimiter.  ### 3.1 menu.txt - Fields:   - dish_id (int)   - name (string)   - category (string)   - price (float)   - description (string) - Example rows:   - `1|Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh lettuce`   - `2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh salmon grilled to perfection`   - `3|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium tea`  ### 3.2 reservations.txt - Fields:   - reservation_id (int)   - username (string)   - guest_name (string)   - phone (string)   - email (string)   - party_size (int)   - date (YYYY-MM-DD)   - time (HH:MM)   - special_requests (string)   - status (string) [Upcoming, Completed, Cancelled] - Example:   - `1|john_diner|John Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed`   - `2|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming`  ### 3.3 waitlist.txt - Fields:   - waitlist_id (int)   - username (string)   - party_size (int)   - datetime (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)   - status (string) [Active, Removed] - Example:   - `1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active`  ### 3.4 reviews.txt - Fields:   - review_id (int)   - username (string)   - dish_id (int)   - rating (int, 1-5 stars)   - review_text (string)   - date (YYYY-MM-DD) - Example:   - `1|john_diner|2|5|Excellent Salmon dish!|2024-11-21`  ---  ## 4. Notes - All element IDs must be placed exactly as specified for frontend interaction consistency. - Context variables and their structures are given for each template to enable frontend rendering and for backend to provide correct context. - All routes must be named in the Flask app (functions names), and URLs generated via `url_for`. - POST requests occur for form submissions such as making/cancelling reservations, joining waitlist, submitting reviews, and editing profile. - The specification supports full implementation and testing independently of the frontend team.
================================================================================

# Requirements Document for 'RestaurantReservation' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'RestaurantReservation' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse restaurant menus, make table reservations, write reviews, check waitlist status, and manage their dining history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'RestaurantReservation' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'RestaurantReservation' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Restaurant Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured dishes, upcoming reservations, and navigation to other functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.
  - **ID: make-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to reservation page.
  - **ID: view-menu-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to menu page.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to refresh dashboard.
  - **ID: my-reservations-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reservations page.
  - **ID: my-reviews-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reviews page.
  - **ID: waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to waitlist page.
  - **ID: profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to user profile page.

### 2. Menu Page
- **Page Title**: Restaurant Menu
- **Overview**: A page displaying the restaurant menu with categories and filtering.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: menu-page** - Type: Div - Container for the menu page.
  - **ID: menu-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying dish cards with image, name, price, description.
  - **ID: view-dish-button-{dish_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view dish details (each card has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 3. Dish Details Page
- **Page Title**: Dish Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific dish.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dish-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dish details page.
  - **ID: dish-name** - Type: H1 - Display dish name.
  - **ID: dish-price** - Type: Div - Display dish price.
  - **ID: back-to-menu** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to menu.

### 4. Make Reservation Page
- **Page Title**: Make Reservation
- **Overview**: A page for users to make a table reservation.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reservation-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservation page.
  - **ID: guest-name** - Type: Input - Field to input guest name.
  - **ID: party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size (1-10).
  - **ID: reservation-date** - Type: Input (date) - Field to select reservation date.
  - **ID: submit-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit reservation.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 5. My Reservations Page
- **Page Title**: My Reservations
- **Overview**: A page displaying all reservations made by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: my-reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my reservations page.
  - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reservations with date, time, party size, status.
  - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each upcoming reservation has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. Waitlist Page
- **Page Title**: Waitlist
- **Overview**: A page for users to join the waitlist and check their position.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: waitlist-page** - Type: Div - Container for the waitlist page.
  - **ID: waitlist-party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size.
  - **ID: join-waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to join waitlist.
  - **ID: user-position** - Type: Div - Display user's current position in waitlist.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. My Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: My Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with dish name, rating, review text.
  - **ID: write-new-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write a review for a dish.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: select-dish** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select dish to review.
  - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.
  - **ID: back-to-reviews** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to my reviews.

### 9. User Profile Page
- **Page Title**: My Profile
- **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.
  - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'RestaurantReservation' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. User Data
- **File Name**: `users.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  username|email|phone|full_name
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  john_diner|john@example.com|555-1234|John Diner
  jane_food|jane@example.com|555-5678|Jane Foodie
  ```

### 2. Menu Items Data
- **File Name**: `menu.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  dish_id|name|category|price|description|ingredients|dietary|avg_rating
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Caesar Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh romaine lettuce with caesar dressing|Romaine,Parmesan,Croutons,Dressing|Vegetarian|4.5
  2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh Atlantic salmon grilled to perfection|Salmon,Lemon,Herbs,Vegetables|Gluten-Free|4.8
  3|Chocolate Lava Cake|Desserts|7.99|Warm chocolate cake with molten center|Chocolate,Flour,Eggs,Sugar|Vegetarian|4.9
  4|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium Japanese green tea|Green Tea Leaves,Water|Vegan|4.6
  ```

### 3. Reservations Data
- **File Name**: `reservations.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  reservation_id|username|guest_name|phone|email|party_size|date|time|special_requests|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|4|2024-12-01|18:00|Window seat please|Upcoming
  2|jane_food|Jane Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed
  3|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming
  ```

### 4. Waitlist Data
- **File Name**: `waitlist.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  waitlist_id|username|party_size|join_time|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:30:00|Active
  2|jane_food|4|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active
  ```

### 5. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|username|dish_id|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_food|2|5|Best salmon I've ever had!|2024-11-21
  2|john_diner|3|5|Absolutely divine dessert!|2024-11-20
  3|jane_food|1|4|Fresh and tasty, but dressing could be creamier.|2024-11-19
  ```

All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.


=== design_spec.md ===
# RestaurantReservation Application Specification

## Overview
This document specifies the design and implementation details for the RestaurantReservation web application using Flask. It covers the application routes, HTTP methods, template files, context variables, frontend element IDs, and the data files format and structure.

---

## 1. Routes and HTTP Methods
All form submissions use the POST method.

| Route                 | HTTP Method | Description                               | Template                 |
|-----------------------|-------------|-------------------------------------------|--------------------------|
| `/dashboard`          | GET         | Dashboard page displaying upcoming reservations and navigation buttons | `templates/dashboard.html` |
| `/menu`               | GET         | Restaurant menu page with filtering        | `templates/menu.html`         |
| `/menu/<int:dish_id>` | GET         | Dish details page                          | `templates/dish_details.html`  |
| `/make_reservation`   | GET, POST   | Reservation form page and submission      | `templates/make_reservation.html` |
| `/my_reservations`    | GET         | List of user's reservations                | `templates/my_reservations.html` |
| `/cancel_reservation` | POST        | Cancel a reservation                        | No template (redirects)          |
| `/waitlist`           | GET, POST   | Waitlist page, join and view position      | `templates/waitlist.html`        |
| `/my_reviews`         | GET         | User's reviews page                         | `templates/my_reviews.html`      |
| `/write_review`       | GET, POST   | Write a new review page and submission     | `templates/write_review.html`    |
| `/profile`            | GET, POST   | Profile page to view and update info       | `templates/profile.html`         |

---

## 2. Template Files and Context Variables

### dashboard.html
- **Title:** Dashboard
- **Element IDs:**
  - `dashboard-page` (container div)
  - `make-reservation-button` (button): navigates to `/make_reservation`
  - `view-menu-button` (button): navigates to `/menu`
  - `waitlist-button` (button): navigates to `/waitlist`
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): refresh current dashboard page
- **Context Variables:**
  - `username` (string): current user's name
  - `upcoming_reservations` (list of dicts): each dict contains:
    - `reservation_id` (int)
    - `guest_name` (string)
    - `party_size` (int)
    - `date` (string, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    - `time` (string, 'HH:MM')
    - `special_requests` (string)
    - `status` (string)
- **Flask url_for usage example:**
  - Navigation buttons call `url_for('route_name')`

### menu.html
- **Title:** Restaurant Menu
- **Element IDs:**
  - `menu-page` (container div)
  - For each menu item:
    - `dish-name-{dish_id}`: dish name (text)
    - `dish-category-{dish_id}`: category (text)
    - `dish-price-{dish_id}`: price (text)
    - `view-details-button-{dish_id}`: button to `/menu/<dish_id>`
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): navigates back to `/dashboard`
- **Context Variables:**
  - `menus` (list of dicts):
    - `dish_id` (int)
    - `name` (string)
    - `category` (string)
    - `price` (float)
    - `description` (string)

### dish_details.html
- **Title:** Dish Details
- **Element IDs:**
  - `dish-details-page` (container div)
  - `dish-name` (H1): dish name
  - `dish-price` (div): dish price
  - `dish-description` (div): dish description
  - `back-to-menu` (button): navigates back to `/menu`
- **Context Variables:**
  - `dish` (dict):
    - `dish_id` (int)
    - `name` (string)
    - `category` (string)
    - `price` (float)
    - `description` (string)

### make_reservation.html
- **Title:** Make a Reservation
- **Element IDs:**
  - `make-reservation-page` (container div)
  - `guest-name-input` (input text)
  - `phone-input` (input text)
  - `email-input` (input text)
  - `party-size-input` (select dropdown)
  - `reservation-date` (input date picker)
  - `reservation-time` (input time picker)
  - `special-requests-input` (textarea)
  - `submit-reservation-button` (button): submits form POST
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): navigates back to `/dashboard`
- **Context Variables:**
  - None (form fields are empty or prefilled if user data is known)

### my_reservations.html
- **Title:** My Reservations
- **Element IDs:**
  - `my-reservations-page` (container div)
  - For each reservation:
    - `reservation-{reservation_id}` (div) container
    - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` (button): posts to cancel
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): back to `/dashboard`
- **Context Variables:**
  - `reservations` (list of dicts):
    - `reservation_id` (int)
    - `guest_name` (string)
    - `party_size` (int)
    - `date` (string)
    - `time` (string)
    - `status` (string)

### waitlist.html
- **Title:** Waitlist
- **Element IDs:**
  - `waitlist-page` (container div)
  - `party-size-dropdown` (select) to join waitlist
  - `join-waitlist-button` (button) to submit
  - `user-position` (div) showing user's current position
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)
- **Context Variables:**
  - `waitlist_position` (int or None if not in list)

### my_reviews.html
- **Title:** My Reviews
- **Element IDs:**
  - `my-reviews-page` (container div)
  - For each review:
    - `review-{review_id}` (div) container
    - show dish name, rating stars, review text
  - `write-new-review-button` (button): navigates to `/write_review`
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)
- **Context Variables:**
  - `reviews` (list of dict):
    - `review_id` (int)
    - `dish_name` (string)
    - `rating` (int)
    - `review_text` (string)

### write_review.html
- **Title:** Write a Review
- **Element IDs:**
  - `write-review-page` (container div)
  - `dish-dropdown` (select) to select dish
  - `rating-input` (select dropdown stars 1-5)
  - `review-text-input` (textarea)
  - `submit-review-button` (button) submits form
  - `back-to-my-reviews` (button)
- **Context Variables:**
  - `menus` (list of dict): list of dishes for dropdown

### profile.html
- **Title:** My Profile
- **Element IDs:**
  - `profile-page` (container div)
  - `profile-email` (input text)
  - `profile-phone` (input text)
  - `save-profile-button` (button)
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)
- **Context Variables:**
  - `user_profile` (dict):
    - `email` (string)
    - `phone` (string)

---

## 3. Data Files

Data files stored in `data/` directory. All use pipe (`|`) delimiter.

### 3.1 menu.txt
- Fields:
  - dish_id (int)
  - name (string)
  - category (string)
  - price (float)
  - description (string)
- Example rows:
  - `1|Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh lettuce`
  - `2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh salmon grilled to perfection`
  - `3|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium tea`

### 3.2 reservations.txt
- Fields:
  - reservation_id (int)
  - username (string)
  - guest_name (string)
  - phone (string)
  - email (string)
  - party_size (int)
  - date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - time (HH:MM)
  - special_requests (string)
  - status (string) [Upcoming, Completed, Cancelled]
- Example:
  - `1|john_diner|John Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed`
  - `2|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming`

### 3.3 waitlist.txt
- Fields:
  - waitlist_id (int)
  - username (string)
  - party_size (int)
  - datetime (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)
  - status (string) [Active, Removed]
- Example:
  - `1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active`

### 3.4 reviews.txt
- Fields:
  - review_id (int)
  - username (string)
  - dish_id (int)
  - rating (int, 1-5 stars)
  - review_text (string)
  - date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example:
  - `1|john_diner|2|5|Excellent Salmon dish!|2024-11-21`

---

## 4. Notes
- All element IDs must be placed exactly as specified for frontend interaction consistency.
- Context variables and their structures are given for each template to enable frontend rendering and for backend to provide correct context.
- All routes must be named in the Flask app (functions names), and URLs generated via `url_for`.
- POST requests occur for form submissions such as making/cancelling reservations, joining waitlist, submitting reviews, and editing profile.
- The specification supports full implementation and testing independently of the frontend team.

[DEBUG] Review Content for SystemArchitect -> FrontendDeveloper:
  [user_task_description] # Requirements Document for 'RestaurantReservation' Web Application  ## 1. Objective Develop a comprehensive web application named 'RestaurantReservation' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse restaurant menus, make table reservations, write reviews, check waitlist status, and manage their dining history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.  ## 2. Language The required development language for the 'RestaurantReservation' application is Python.  ## 3. Page Design  The 'RestaurantReservation' web application will consist of the following nine pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: Restaurant Dashboard - **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured dishes, upcoming reservations, and navigation to other functionalities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.   - **ID: make-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to reservation page.   - **ID: view-menu-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to menu page.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to refresh dashboard.   - **ID: my-reservations-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reservations page.   - **ID: my-reviews-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reviews page.   - **ID: waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to waitlist page.   - **ID: profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to user profile page.  ### 2. Menu Page - **Page Title**: Restaurant Menu - **Overview**: A page displaying the restaurant menu with categories and filtering. - **Elements**:   - **ID: menu-page** - Type: Div - Container for the menu page.   - **ID: menu-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying dish cards with image, name, price, description.   - **ID: view-dish-button-{dish_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view dish details (each card has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 3. Dish Details Page - **Page Title**: Dish Details - **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific dish. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dish-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dish details page.   - **ID: dish-name** - Type: H1 - Display dish name.   - **ID: dish-price** - Type: Div - Display dish price.   - **ID: back-to-menu** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to menu.  ### 4. Make Reservation Page - **Page Title**: Make Reservation - **Overview**: A page for users to make a table reservation. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reservation-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservation page.   - **ID: guest-name** - Type: Input - Field to input guest name.   - **ID: party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size (1-10).   - **ID: reservation-date** - Type: Input (date) - Field to select reservation date.   - **ID: submit-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit reservation.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 5. My Reservations Page - **Page Title**: My Reservations - **Overview**: A page displaying all reservations made by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: my-reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my reservations page.   - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reservations with date, time, party size, status.   - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each upcoming reservation has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 6. Waitlist Page - **Page Title**: Waitlist - **Overview**: A page for users to join the waitlist and check their position. - **Elements**:   - **ID: waitlist-page** - Type: Div - Container for the waitlist page.   - **ID: waitlist-party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size.   - **ID: join-waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to join waitlist.   - **ID: user-position** - Type: Div - Display user's current position in waitlist.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 7. My Reviews Page - **Page Title**: My Reviews - **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.   - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with dish name, rating, review text.   - **ID: write-new-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Write Review Page - **Page Title**: Write Review - **Overview**: A page for users to write a review for a dish. - **Elements**:   - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.   - **ID: select-dish** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select dish to review.   - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).   - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.   - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.   - **ID: back-to-reviews** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to my reviews.  ### 9. User Profile Page - **Page Title**: My Profile - **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information. - **Elements**:   - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.   - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).   - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.   - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'RestaurantReservation' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. User Data - **File Name**: `users.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   username|email|phone|full_name   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   john_diner|john@example.com|555-1234|John Diner   jane_food|jane@example.com|555-5678|Jane Foodie   ```  ### 2. Menu Items Data - **File Name**: `menu.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   dish_id|name|category|price|description|ingredients|dietary|avg_rating   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Caesar Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh romaine lettuce with caesar dressing|Romaine,Parmesan,Croutons,Dressing|Vegetarian|4.5   2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh Atlantic salmon grilled to perfection|Salmon,Lemon,Herbs,Vegetables|Gluten-Free|4.8   3|Chocolate Lava Cake|Desserts|7.99|Warm chocolate cake with molten center|Chocolate,Flour,Eggs,Sugar|Vegetarian|4.9   4|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium Japanese green tea|Green Tea Leaves,Water|Vegan|4.6   ```  ### 3. Reservations Data - **File Name**: `reservations.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   reservation_id|username|guest_name|phone|email|party_size|date|time|special_requests|status   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|4|2024-12-01|18:00|Window seat please|Upcoming   2|jane_food|Jane Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed   3|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming   ```  ### 4. Waitlist Data - **File Name**: `waitlist.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   waitlist_id|username|party_size|join_time|status   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:30:00|Active   2|jane_food|4|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active   ```  ### 5. Reviews Data - **File Name**: `reviews.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   review_id|username|dish_id|rating|review_text|review_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|jane_food|2|5|Best salmon I've ever had!|2024-11-21   2|john_diner|3|5|Absolutely divine dessert!|2024-11-20   3|jane_food|1|4|Fresh and tasty, but dressing could be creamier.|2024-11-19   ```  All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.
  [design_spec.md] # RestaurantReservation Application Specification  ## Overview This document specifies the design and implementation details for the RestaurantReservation web application using Flask. It covers the application routes, HTTP methods, template files, context variables, frontend element IDs, and the data files format and structure.  ---  ## 1. Routes and HTTP Methods All form submissions use the POST method.  | Route                 | HTTP Method | Description                               | Template                 | |-----------------------|-------------|-------------------------------------------|--------------------------| | `/dashboard`          | GET         | Dashboard page displaying upcoming reservations and navigation buttons | `templates/dashboard.html` | | `/menu`               | GET         | Restaurant menu page with filtering        | `templates/menu.html`         | | `/menu/<int:dish_id>` | GET         | Dish details page                          | `templates/dish_details.html`  | | `/make_reservation`   | GET, POST   | Reservation form page and submission      | `templates/make_reservation.html` | | `/my_reservations`    | GET         | List of user's reservations                | `templates/my_reservations.html` | | `/cancel_reservation` | POST        | Cancel a reservation                        | No template (redirects)          | | `/waitlist`           | GET, POST   | Waitlist page, join and view position      | `templates/waitlist.html`        | | `/my_reviews`         | GET         | User's reviews page                         | `templates/my_reviews.html`      | | `/write_review`       | GET, POST   | Write a new review page and submission     | `templates/write_review.html`    | | `/profile`            | GET, POST   | Profile page to view and update info       | `templates/profile.html`         |  ---  ## 2. Template Files and Context Variables  ### dashboard.html - **Title:** Dashboard - **Element IDs:**   - `dashboard-page` (container div)   - `make-reservation-button` (button): navigates to `/make_reservation`   - `view-menu-button` (button): navigates to `/menu`   - `waitlist-button` (button): navigates to `/waitlist`   - `back-to-dashboard` (button): refresh current dashboard page - **Context Variables:**   - `username` (string): current user's name   - `upcoming_reservations` (list of dicts): each dict contains:     - `reservation_id` (int)     - `guest_name` (string)     - `party_size` (int)     - `date` (string, 'YYYY-MM-DD')     - `time` (string, 'HH:MM')     - `special_requests` (string)     - `status` (string) - **Flask url_for usage example:**   - Navigation buttons call `url_for('route_name')`  ### menu.html - **Title:** Restaurant Menu - **Element IDs:**   - `menu-page` (container div)   - For each menu item:     - `dish-name-{dish_id}`: dish name (text)     - `dish-category-{dish_id}`: category (text)     - `dish-price-{dish_id}`: price (text)     - `view-details-button-{dish_id}`: button to `/menu/<dish_id>`   - `back-to-dashboard` (button): navigates back to `/dashboard` - **Context Variables:**   - `menus` (list of dicts):     - `dish_id` (int)     - `name` (string)     - `category` (string)     - `price` (float)     - `description` (string)  ### dish_details.html - **Title:** Dish Details - **Element IDs:**   - `dish-details-page` (container div)   - `dish-name` (H1): dish name   - `dish-price` (div): dish price   - `dish-description` (div): dish description   - `back-to-menu` (button): navigates back to `/menu` - **Context Variables:**   - `dish` (dict):     - `dish_id` (int)     - `name` (string)     - `category` (string)     - `price` (float)     - `description` (string)  ### make_reservation.html - **Title:** Make a Reservation - **Element IDs:**   - `make-reservation-page` (container div)   - `guest-name-input` (input text)   - `phone-input` (input text)   - `email-input` (input text)   - `party-size-input` (select dropdown)   - `reservation-date` (input date picker)   - `reservation-time` (input time picker)   - `special-requests-input` (textarea)   - `submit-reservation-button` (button): submits form POST   - `back-to-dashboard` (button): navigates back to `/dashboard` - **Context Variables:**   - None (form fields are empty or prefilled if user data is known)  ### my_reservations.html - **Title:** My Reservations - **Element IDs:**   - `my-reservations-page` (container div)   - For each reservation:     - `reservation-{reservation_id}` (div) container     - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` (button): posts to cancel   - `back-to-dashboard` (button): back to `/dashboard` - **Context Variables:**   - `reservations` (list of dicts):     - `reservation_id` (int)     - `guest_name` (string)     - `party_size` (int)     - `date` (string)     - `time` (string)     - `status` (string)  ### waitlist.html - **Title:** Waitlist - **Element IDs:**   - `waitlist-page` (container div)   - `party-size-dropdown` (select) to join waitlist   - `join-waitlist-button` (button) to submit   - `user-position` (div) showing user's current position   - `back-to-dashboard` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `waitlist_position` (int or None if not in list)  ### my_reviews.html - **Title:** My Reviews - **Element IDs:**   - `my-reviews-page` (container div)   - For each review:     - `review-{review_id}` (div) container     - show dish name, rating stars, review text   - `write-new-review-button` (button): navigates to `/write_review`   - `back-to-dashboard` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `reviews` (list of dict):     - `review_id` (int)     - `dish_name` (string)     - `rating` (int)     - `review_text` (string)  ### write_review.html - **Title:** Write a Review - **Element IDs:**   - `write-review-page` (container div)   - `dish-dropdown` (select) to select dish   - `rating-input` (select dropdown stars 1-5)   - `review-text-input` (textarea)   - `submit-review-button` (button) submits form   - `back-to-my-reviews` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `menus` (list of dict): list of dishes for dropdown  ### profile.html - **Title:** My Profile - **Element IDs:**   - `profile-page` (container div)   - `profile-email` (input text)   - `profile-phone` (input text)   - `save-profile-button` (button)   - `back-to-dashboard` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `user_profile` (dict):     - `email` (string)     - `phone` (string)  ---  ## 3. Data Files  Data files stored in `data/` directory. All use pipe (`|`) delimiter.  ### 3.1 menu.txt - Fields:   - dish_id (int)   - name (string)   - category (string)   - price (float)   - description (string) - Example rows:   - `1|Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh lettuce`   - `2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh salmon grilled to perfection`   - `3|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium tea`  ### 3.2 reservations.txt - Fields:   - reservation_id (int)   - username (string)   - guest_name (string)   - phone (string)   - email (string)   - party_size (int)   - date (YYYY-MM-DD)   - time (HH:MM)   - special_requests (string)   - status (string) [Upcoming, Completed, Cancelled] - Example:   - `1|john_diner|John Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed`   - `2|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming`  ### 3.3 waitlist.txt - Fields:   - waitlist_id (int)   - username (string)   - party_size (int)   - datetime (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)   - status (string) [Active, Removed] - Example:   - `1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active`  ### 3.4 reviews.txt - Fields:   - review_id (int)   - username (string)   - dish_id (int)   - rating (int, 1-5 stars)   - review_text (string)   - date (YYYY-MM-DD) - Example:   - `1|john_diner|2|5|Excellent Salmon dish!|2024-11-21`  ---  ## 4. Notes - All element IDs must be placed exactly as specified for frontend interaction consistency. - Context variables and their structures are given for each template to enable frontend rendering and for backend to provide correct context. - All routes must be named in the Flask app (functions names), and URLs generated via `url_for`. - POST requests occur for form submissions such as making/cancelling reservations, joining waitlist, submitting reviews, and editing profile. - The specification supports full implementation and testing independently of the frontend team.
================================================================================
