  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with dish name, rating, review text.
  - **ID: write-new-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write a review for a dish.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: select-dish** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select dish to review.
  - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.
  - **ID: back-to-reviews** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to my reviews.

### 9. User Profile Page
- **Page Title**: My Profile
- **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.
  - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'RestaurantReservation' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. User Data
- **File Name**: `users.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  username|email|phone|full_name
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  john_diner|john@example.com|555-1234|John Diner
  jane_food|jane@example.com|555-5678|Jane Foodie
  ```

### 2. Menu Items Data
- **File Name**: `menu.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  dish_id|name|category|price|description|ingredients|dietary|avg_rating
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Caesar Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh romaine lettuce with caesar dressing|Romaine,Parmesan,Croutons,Dressing|Vegetarian|4.5
  2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh Atlantic salmon grilled to perfection|Salmon,Lemon,Herbs,Vegetables|Gluten-Free|4.8
  3|Chocolate Lava Cake|Desserts|7.99|Warm chocolate cake with molten center|Chocolate,Flour,Eggs,Sugar|Vegetarian|4.9
  4|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium Japanese green tea|Green Tea Leaves,Water|Vegan|4.6
  ```

### 3. Reservations Data
- **File Name**: `reservations.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  reservation_id|username|guest_name|phone|email|party_size|date|time|special_requests|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|4|2024-12-01|18:00|Window seat please|Upcoming
  2|jane_food|Jane Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed
  3|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming
  ```

### 4. Waitlist Data
- **File Name**: `waitlist.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  waitlist_id|username|party_size|join_time|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:30:00|Active
  2|jane_food|4|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active
  ```

### 5. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|username|dish_id|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_food|2|5|Best salmon I've ever had!|2024-11-21
  2|john_diner|3|5|Absolutely divine dessert!|2024-11-20
  3|jane_food|1|4|Fresh and tasty, but dressing could be creamier.|2024-11-19
  ```

All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.


=== design_spec.md ===
# RestaurantReservation Application Design Specification (Based on User Task Description)

## 1. Flask Routes and HTTP Methods

| Route                      | HTTP Method     | Description                                  | Template File                |
|----------------------------|-----------------|----------------------------------------------|------------------------------|
| /                          | GET             | Root route redirects to `/dashboard`         | None (redirect)               |
| /dashboard                 | GET             | Dashboard main page                           | templates/dashboard.html     |
| /menu                      | GET             | Restaurant menu page with filtering           | templates/menu.html          |
| /menu/<int:dish_id>        | GET             | Show details for a dish                        | templates/dish_details.html  |
| /make_reservation          | GET, POST       | Page and form to make a table reservation     | templates/make_reservation.html |
| /my_reservations           | GET             | List current user's reservations               | templates/my_reservations.html |
| /cancel_reservation        | POST            | Cancel a reservation                           | None (redirect or JSON response) |
| /waitlist                  | GET, POST       | View/join waitlist and show position          | templates/waitlist.html       |
| /my_reviews                | GET             | View all reviews written by the user          | templates/my_reviews.html     |
| /write_review              | GET, POST       | Write a new review form and submit             | templates/write_review.html   |
| /profile                   | GET, POST       | Show and edit user profile info                 | templates/profile.html        |

## 2. HTML Templates and Elements

### 2.1 Dashboard (templates/dashboard.html)
- Root container: `dashboard-page` (div)
- Elements:
  - `welcome-message` (H1): Displays username welcome message.
  - `make-reservation-button` (button): Navigate to `/make_reservation`.
  - `view-menu-button` (button): Navigate to `/menu`.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Refresh dashboard page.
  - `my-reservations-button` (button): Navigate to `/my_reservations`.
  - `my-reviews-button` (button): Navigate to `/my_reviews`.
  - `waitlist-button` (button): Navigate to `/waitlist`.
  - `profile-button` (button): Navigate to `/profile`.

### 2.2 Restaurant Menu (templates/menu.html)
- Root container: `menu-page` (div)
- Elements for each dish (using dish_id for dynamic IDs):
  - `view-dish-button-{dish_id}` (button): Navigates to `/menu/<dish_id>` to see details.
- `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate back to `/dashboard`.

### 2.3 Dish Details (templates/dish_details.html)
- Root container: `dish-details-page` (div)
- Elements:
  - `dish-name` (H1): Name of the dish.
  - `dish-price` (div): Price of the dish.
  - `dish-description` (div): Detailed description.
  - `back-to-menu` (button): Navigate back to `/menu`.

### 2.4 Make Reservation (templates/make_reservation.html)
- Root container: `reservation-page` (div)
- Form Fields:
  - `guest-name` (input text): Guest's name.
  - `phone` (input text): Guest phone number.
  - `email` (input text): Guest email address.
  - `party-size` (select dropdown): Number of guests.
  - `reservation-date` (input date): Date for reservation.
  - `reservation-time` (input time): Time for reservation.
  - `special-requests` (textarea): Special requests.
- Buttons:
  - `submit-reservation-button` (button): Submit reservation form.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate to `/dashboard`.

### 2.5 My Reservations (templates/my_reservations.html)
- Root container: `my-reservations-page` (div)
- Table: `reservations-table` displaying reservation details including Date, Time, Party Size, Status.
- For each reservation:
  - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` (button): Button to cancel given reservation.
- `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate back to `/dashboard`.

### 2.6 Waitlist (templates/waitlist.html)
- Root container: `waitlist-page` (div)
- Elements:
  - `party-size-select` (select): Dropdown to select party size to join waitlist.
  - `join-waitlist-button` (button): Button to submit joining waitlist.
  - `user-position` (div): Displays user's current position in waitlist.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate to `/dashboard`.

### 2.7 My Reviews (templates/my_reviews.html)
- Root container: `reviews-page` (div)
- List: `reviews-list` (div) containing all reviews with:
  - Dish name
  - Rating stars
  - Review text
- Navigation Buttons:
  - `write-new-review-button` (button): Navigate to `/write_review`.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate to `/dashboard`.

### 2.8 Write Review (templates/write_review.html)
- Root container: `write-review-page` (div)
- Form Elements:
  - `select-dish` (select dropdown): Dropdown to choose dish to review.
  - `rating-input` (select dropdown): Select rating stars (1 to 5).
  - `review-text` (textarea): Input for review text.
- Buttons:
  - `submit-review-button` (button): Submit review.
  - `back-to-reviews` (button): Back to `/my_reviews` page.

### 2.9 Profile Page (templates/profile.html)
- Root container: `profile-page` (div)
- Elements:
  - `profile-username` (div): Display and editable user full name.
  - `profile-email` (input text): User email.
  - `profile-phone` (input text): User phone number.
  - `save-profile-button` (button): Save changes.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Back to `/dashboard`.


## 3. Data File Formats and Examples

All data files stored in `data/` directory with pipe `|` delimiter.

### 3.1 Users Data (users.txt)
- Fields:
  - username (string)
  - email (string)
  - phone (string)
  - full_name (string)
- Example entries:
  ```
john_diner|john@example.com|555-1234|John Diner
jane_food|jane@example.com|555-5678|Jane Foodie
```

### 3.2 Menu Data (menu.txt)
- Fields:
  - dish_id (int)
  - name (string)
  - category (string)
  - price (float)
  - description (string)
  - ingredients (string comma separated)
  - dietary_info (string, e.g. Vegetarian)
  - rating (float, average rating 1.0-5.0)
- Example entries:
  ```
1|Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh romaine with Caesar dressing|Romaine,Parmesan,Croutons,Dressing|Vegetarian|4.5
2|Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh salmon grilled to perfection|Salmon,Garlic,Olive oil|Non-Vegetarian|4.9
3|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium Japanese green tea|Green tea leaves|Vegan|4.2
```

### 3.3 Reservations Data (reservations.txt)
- Fields:
  - reservation_id (int)
  - username (string)
  - guest_name (string)
  - phone (string)
  - email (string)
  - party_size (int)
  - date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - time (HH:MM)
  - special_requests (string)
  - status (string) [Possible values: Upcoming, Completed, Cancelled]
- Example entries:
  ```
1|john_diner|John Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed
2|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming
```

### 3.4 Waitlist Data (waitlist.txt)
- Fields:
  - waitlist_id (int)
  - username (string)
  - party_size (int)
  - join_time (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)
  - status (string) [Possible values: Active, Removed]
- Example entries:
  ```
1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active
2|jane_food|4|2024-11-22 19:00:00|Active
```

### 3.5 Reviews Data (reviews.txt)
- Fields:
  - review_id (int)
  - username (string)
  - dish_id (int)
  - rating (int 1-5)
  - review_text (string)
  - date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example entries:
  ```
1|jane_food|2|5|Best I've had!|2024-11-21
2|john_diner|3|5|Absolutely delicious dessert!|2024-11-20
```


## 4. Notes
- All element IDs must match exactly as specified for frontend and backend integration.
- Function names in Flask must be lowercase_with_underscores and consistent.
- Use Flask's `url_for` for generating URLs.
- POST method used for all form submissions, including making/cancelling reservations, joining waitlist, writing reviews, and updating profile.
- Root route `/` should redirect to `/dashboard`.
- Data files use pipe delimiter with specified fields and examples, ensuring easy parsing and data integrity.

This detailed specification enables frontend and backend development to proceed independently and fully interoperably.

# Requirements Document for 'RestaurantReservation' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'RestaurantReservation' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse restaurant menus, make table reservations, write reviews, check waitlist status, and manage their dining history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'RestaurantReservation' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'RestaurantReservation' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Restaurant Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured dishes, upcoming reservations, and navigation to other functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.
  - **ID: make-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to reservation page.
  - **ID: view-menu-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to menu page.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to refresh dashboard.
  - **ID: my-reservations-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reservations page.
  - **ID: my-reviews-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reviews page.
  - **ID: waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to waitlist page.
  - **ID: profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to user profile page.

### 2. Menu Page
- **Page Title**: Restaurant Menu
- **Overview**: A page displaying the restaurant menu with categories and filtering.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: menu-page** - Type: Div - Container for the menu page.
  - **ID: menu-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying dish cards with image, name, price, description.
  - **ID: view-dish-button-{dish_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view dish details (each card has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 3. Dish Details Page
- **Page Title**: Dish Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific dish.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dish-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dish details page.
  - **ID: dish-name** - Type: H1 - Display dish name.
  - **ID: dish-price** - Type: Div - Display dish price.
  - **ID: back-to-menu** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to menu.

### 4. Make Reservation Page
- **Page Title**: Make Reservation
- **Overview**: A page for users to make a table reservation.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reservation-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservation page.
  - **ID: guest-name** - Type: Input - Field to input guest name.
  - **ID: party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size (1-10).
  - **ID: reservation-date** - Type: Input (date) - Field to select reservation date.
  - **ID: submit-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit reservation.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 5. My Reservations Page
- **Page Title**: My Reservations
- **Overview**: A page displaying all reservations made by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: my-reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my reservations page.
  - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reservations with date, time, party size, status.
  - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each upcoming reservation has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. Waitlist Page
- **Page Title**: Waitlist
- **Overview**: A page for users to join the waitlist and check their position.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: waitlist-page** - Type: Div - Container for the waitlist page.
  - **ID: waitlist-party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size.
  - **ID: join-waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to join waitlist.
  - **ID: user-position** - Type: Div - Display user's current position in waitlist.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. My Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: My Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with dish name, rating, review text.
  - **ID: write-new-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write a review for a dish.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: select-dish** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select dish to review.
  - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.
  - **ID: back-to-reviews** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to my reviews.

### 9. User Profile Page
- **Page Title**: My Profile
- **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.
  - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'RestaurantReservation' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. User Data
- **File Name**: `users.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  username|email|phone|full_name
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  john_diner|john@example.com|555-1234|John Diner
  jane_food|jane@example.com|555-5678|Jane Foodie
  ```

### 2. Menu Items Data
- **File Name**: `menu.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  dish_id|name|category|price|description|ingredients|dietary|avg_rating
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Caesar Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh romaine lettuce with caesar dressing|Romaine,Parmesan,Croutons,Dressing|Vegetarian|4.5
  2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh Atlantic salmon grilled to perfection|Salmon,Lemon,Herbs,Vegetables|Gluten-Free|4.8
  3|Chocolate Lava Cake|Desserts|7.99|Warm chocolate cake with molten center|Chocolate,Flour,Eggs,Sugar|Vegetarian|4.9
  4|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium Japanese green tea|Green Tea Leaves,Water|Vegan|4.6
  ```

### 3. Reservations Data
- **File Name**: `reservations.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  reservation_id|username|guest_name|phone|email|party_size|date|time|special_requests|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|4|2024-12-01|18:00|Window seat please|Upcoming
  2|jane_food|Jane Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed
  3|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming
  ```

### 4. Waitlist Data
- **File Name**: `waitlist.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  waitlist_id|username|party_size|join_time|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:30:00|Active
  2|jane_food|4|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active
  ```

### 5. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|username|dish_id|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_food|2|5|Best salmon I've ever had!|2024-11-21
  2|john_diner|3|5|Absolutely divine dessert!|2024-11-20
  3|jane_food|1|4|Fresh and tasty, but dressing could be creamier.|2024-11-19
  ```

All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.

`view-menu-button` (button): navigates to `/menu`\n  - `waitlist-button` (button): navigates to `/waitlist`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): refresh current dashboard page\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `username` (string): current user's name\n  - `upcoming_reservations` (list of dicts): each dict contains:\n    - `reservation_id` (int)\n    - `guest_name` (string)\n    - `party_size` (int)\n    - `date` (string, 'YYYY-MM-DD')\n    - `reservation-time` (input time picker)\n  - `special-requests-input` (textarea)\n  - `submit-reservation-button` (button): submits form POST\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): navigates back to `/dashboard`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - None (form fields are empty or prefilled if user data is known)\n\n### my_reservations.html\n- **Title:** My Reservations\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `my-reservations-page` (container div)\n  - For each reservation:\n    - `reservation-{reservation_id}` (div) container\n    - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` (button): posts to cancel\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): back to `/dashboard`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `reservations` (list of dicts):\n    - `reservation_id` (int)\n    - `guest_name` (string)\n    - `party_size` (int)\n    - `date` (string)\n    - `time` (string)\n    - `status` (string)\n\n### waitlist.html\n- **Title:** Waitlist\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `waitlist-page` (container div)\n  - `party-size-dropdown` (select) to join waitlist\n  - `join-waitlist-button` (button) to submit\n  - `user-position` (div) showing user's current position\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `waitlist_position` (int or None if not in list)\n\n### my_reviews.html\n- **Title:** My Reviews\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `my-reviews-page` (container div)\n  - For each review:\n    - `review-{review_id}` (div) container\n    - # Requirements Document for 'RestaurantReservation' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'RestaurantReservation' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse restaurant menus, make table reservations, write reviews, check waitlist status, and manage their dining history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'RestaurantReservation' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'RestaurantReservation' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Restaurant Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured dishes, upcoming reservations, and navigation to other functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.
  - **ID: make-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to reservation page.
  - **ID: view-menu-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to menu page.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to refresh dashboard.
  - **ID: my-reservations-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reservations page.
  - **ID: my-reviews-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reviews page.
  - **ID: waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to waitlist page.
  - **ID: profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to user profile page.

### 2. Menu Page
- **Page Title**: Restaurant Menu
- **Overview**: A page displaying the restaurant menu with categories and filtering.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: menu-page** - Type: Div - Container for the menu page.
  - **ID: menu-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying dish cards with image, name, price, description.
  - **ID: view-dish-button-{dish_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view dish details (each card has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 3. Dish Details Page
- **Page Title**: Dish Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific dish.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dish-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dish details page.
  - **ID: dish-name** - Type: H1 - Display dish name.
  - **ID: dish-price** - Type: Div - Display dish price.
  - **ID: back-to-menu** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to menu.

### 4. Make Reservation Page
- **Page Title**: Make Reservation
- **Overview**: A page for users to make a table reservation.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reservation-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservation page.
  - **ID: guest-name** - Type: Input - Field to input guest name.
  - **ID: party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size (1-10).
  - **ID: reservation-date** - Type: Input (date) - Field to select reservation date.
  - **ID: submit-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit reservation.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 5. My Reservations Page
- **Page Title**: My Reservations
- **Overview**: A page displaying all reservations made by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: my-reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my reservations page.
  - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reservations with date, time, party size, status.
  - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each upcoming reservation has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. Waitlist Page
- **Page Title**: Waitlist
- **Overview**: A page for users to join the waitlist and check their position.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: waitlist-page** - Type: Div - Container for the waitlist page.
  - **ID: waitlist-party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size.
  - **ID: join-waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to join waitlist.
  - **ID: user-position** - Type: Div - Display user's current position in waitlist.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. My Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: My Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with dish name, rating, review text.
  - **ID: write-new-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write a review for a dish.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: select-dish** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select dish to review.
  - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.
  - **ID: back-to-reviews** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to my reviews.

### 9. User Profile Page
- **Page Title**: My Profile
- **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.
  - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'RestaurantReservation' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. User Data
- **File Name**: `users.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  username|email|phone|full_name
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  john_diner|john@example.com|555-1234|John Diner
  jane_food|jane@example.com|555-5678|Jane Foodie
  ```

### 2. Menu Items Data
- **File Name**: `menu.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  dish_id|name|category|price|description|ingredients|dietary|avg_rating
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Caesar Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh romaine lettuce with caesar dressing|Romaine,Parmesan,Croutons,Dressing|Vegetarian|4.5
  2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh Atlantic salmon grilled to perfection|Salmon,Lemon,Herbs,Vegetables|Gluten-Free|4.8
  3|Chocolate Lava Cake|Desserts|7.99|Warm chocolate cake with molten center|Chocolate,Flour,Eggs,Sugar|Vegetarian|4.9
  4|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium Japanese green tea|Green Tea Leaves,Water|Vegan|4.6
  ```

### 3. Reservations Data
- **File Name**: `reservations.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  reservation_id|username|guest_name|phone|email|party_size|date|time|special_requests|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|4|2024-12-01|18:00|Window seat please|Upcoming
  2|jane_food|Jane Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed
  3|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming
  ```

### 4. Waitlist Data
- **File Name**: `waitlist.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  waitlist_id|username|party_size|join_time|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:30:00|Active
  2|jane_food|4|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active
  ```

### 5. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|username|dish_id|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_food|2|5|Best salmon I've ever had!|2024-11-21
  2|john_diner|3|5|Absolutely divine dessert!|2024-11-20
  3|jane_food|1|4|Fresh and tasty, but dressing could be creamier.|2024-11-19
  ```

All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.

`my-reviews-button` (button): Navigate to `/my_reviews`.\n  - `waitlist-button` (button): Navigate to `/waitlist`.\n  - `profile-button` (button): Navigate to `/profile`.\n\n### 2.2 Restaurant Menu (templates/menu.html)\n- Root container: `menu-page` (div)\n- Elements for each dish (using dish_id for dynamic IDs):\n  - `view-dish-button-{dish_id}` (button): Navigates to `/menu/<dish_id>` to see details.\n- `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate back to `/dashboard`.\n\n### 2.3 Dish Details (templates/dish_details.html)\n- Root container: `dish-details-page` (div)\n- Elements:\n  - `dish-name` (H1): Name of the dish.\n  - `dish-price` (div): Price of the dish.\n  - `dish-description` (div): Detailed description.\n  - `back-to-menu` (button): Navigate back to `/menu`.\n\n### 2.4 Make Reservation (templates/make_reservation.html)\n- Root container: `reservation-page` (div)\n- Form Fields:\n  - `guest-name` (input text): Guest's name.\n  - `phone` (input text): Guest phone number.\n  - `email` (input text): Guest email address.\n  - `party-size` (select dropdown): Number of guests.\n  - `reservation-date` (input date): Date for reservation.\n  - `reservation-time` (input time): Time for reservation.\n  - `special-requests` (textarea): Special requests.\n- Buttons:\n  - `submit-reservation-button` (button): Submit reservation form.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate to `/dashboard`.\n\n### 2.5 My Reservations (templates/my_reservations.html)\n- Root container: `my-reservations-page` (div)\n- Table: `reservations-table` displaying reservation details including Date, Time, Party Size, Status.\n- For each reservation:\n  - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` (button): Button to cancel given reservation.\n- `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate back to `/dashboard`.\n\n### 2.6 Waitlist (templates/waitlist.html)\n- Root container: `waitlist-page` (div)\n- Elements:\n  - `party-size-select` (select): Dropdown to select party size to join waitlist.\n  - `join-waitlist-button` (button): Button to submit joining waitlist.\n  - `user-position` (div): Displays user's current position in waitlist.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate to `/dashboard`.\n\n### 2.7 My Reviews (templates/my_reviews.html)\n- Root container: `reviews-page` (div)\n- List: `reviews-list` (div) containing all reviews with:\n  - Dish name\n  - Rating stars\n  - Review text\n- Navigation Buttons:\n  - `write-new-review-button` (button): Navigate to `/write_review`.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate to `/dashboard`.\n\n### 2.8 Write Review (templates/write_review.html)\n- Root container: `write-review-page` (div)\n- Form Elements:\n  - `select-dish` (select dropdown): Dropdown to choose dish to review.\n  - `rating-input` (select dropdown): Select rating stars (1 to 5).\n  - `review-text` (textarea): Input for review text.\n- Buttons:\n  - `submit-review-button` (button): Submit review.\n  - `back-to-reviews` (button): Back to `/my_reviews` page.\n\n### 2.9 Profile Page (templates/profile.html)\n- Root container: `profile-page` (div)\n- Elements:\n  - `profile-username` (div): Display and editable user full name.\n  - `profile-email` (input text): User email.\n  - `profile-phone` (input text): User phone number.\n  - `save-profile-button` (button): Save changes.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Back to `/dashboard`.\n\n\n## 3. Data File Formats and Examples\n\nAll data files stored in `data/` directory with pipe `|` delimiter.\n\n### 3.1 Users Data (users.txt)\n- Fields:\n  - username (string)\n  - email (string)\n  - phone (string)\n  - full_name (string)\n- Example entries:\n  ```\njohn_diner|john@example.com|555-1234|John Diner\njane_food|jane@example.com|555-5678|Jane Foodie\n```\n\n### 3.2 Menu Data (menu.txt)\n- Fields:\n  - dish_id (int)\n  - name (string)\n  - category (string)\n  - price (float)\n  - description (string)\n  - ingredients (string comma separated)\n  - dietary_info (string, e.g. Vegetarian)\n  - rating (float, average rating 1.0-5.0)\n- Example entries:\n  ```\n1|Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh romaine with Caesar dressing|Romaine,Parmesan,Croutons,Dressing|Vegetarian|4.5\n2|Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh salmon grilled to perfection|Salmon,Garlic,Olive oil|Non-Vegetarian|4.9\n3|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium Japanese green tea|Green tea leaves|Vegan|4.2\n```\n\n### 3.3 Reservations Data (reservations.txt)\n- Fields:\n  - reservation_id (int)\n  - username (string)\n  - guest_name (string)\n  - phone (string)\n  - email (string)\n  - party_size (int)\n  - date (YYYY-MM-DD)\n  - time (HH:MM)\n  - special_requests (string)\n  - status (string) [Possible values: Upcoming, Completed, Cancelled]\n- Example entries:\n  ```\n1|john_diner|John Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed\n2|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming\n```\n\n### 3.4 Waitlist Data (waitlist.txt)\n- Fields:\n  - waitlist_id (int)\n  - username (string)\n  - party_size (int)\n  - join_time (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)\n  - status (string) [Possible values: Active, Removed]\n- Example entries:\n  ```\n1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active\n2|jane_food|4|2024-11-22 19:00:00|Active\n```\n\n### 3.5 Reviews Data (reviews.txt)\n- Fields:\n  - review_id (int)\n  - username (string)\n  - dish_id (int)\n  - rating (int 1-5)\n  - review_text (string)\n  - date (YYYY-MM-DD)\n- Example entries:\n  ```\n1|jane_food|2|5|Best I've had!|2024-11-21\n2|john_diner|3|5|Absolutely delicious dessert!|2024-11-20\n```\n\n\n## 4. Notes\n- All element IDs must match exactly as specified for frontend and backend integration.\n- Function names in Flask must be lowercase_with_underscores and consistent.\n- Use Flask's `url_for` for generating URLs.\n- POST method used for all form submissions, including making/cancelling reservations, joining waitlist, writing reviews, and updating profile.\n- Root route `/` should redirect to `/dashboard`.\n- Data files use pipe delimiter with specified fields and examples, ensuring easy parsing and data integrity.\n\nThis detailed specification enables frontend and backend development to proceed independently and fully interoperably."})

User Profile Page - **Page Title**: My Profile - **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information. - **Elements**:   - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.   - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).   - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.   - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'RestaurantReservation' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. User Data - **File Name**: `users.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   username|email|phone|full_name   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   john_diner|john@example.com|555-1234|John Diner   jane_food|jane@example.com|555-5678|Jane Foodie   ```  ### 2. Menu Items Data - **File Name**: `menu.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   dish_id|name|category|price|description|ingredients|dietary|avg_rating   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Caesar Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh romaine lettuce with caesar dressing|Romaine,Parmesan,Croutons,Dressing|Vegetarian|4.5   2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh Atlantic salmon grilled to perfection|Salmon,Lemon,Herbs,Vegetables|Gluten-Free|4.8   3|Chocolate Lava Cake|Desserts|7.99|Warm chocolate cake with molten center|Chocolate,Flour,Eggs,Sugar|Vegetarian|4.9   4|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium Japanese green tea|Green Tea Leaves,Water|Vegan|4.6   ```  ### 3. Reservations Data - **File Name**: `reservations.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   reservation_id|username|guest_name|phone|email|party_size|date|time|special_requests|status   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|4|2024-12-01|18:00|Window seat please|Upcoming   2|jane_food|Jane Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed   3|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming   ```  ### 4. Waitlist Data - **File Name**: `waitlist.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   waitlist_id|username|party_size|join_time|status   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:30:00|Active   2|jane_food|4|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active   ```  ### 5. Reviews Data - **File Name**: `reviews.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   review_id|username|dish_id|rating|review_text|review_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|jane_food|2|5|Best salmon I've ever had!|2024-11-21   2|john_diner|3|5|Absolutely divine dessert!|2024-11-20   3|jane_food|1|4|Fresh and tasty, but dressing could be creamier.|2024-11-19   ```  All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.

guest_name (str)\n  - party_size (int)\n  - reservation_date (str)\n  - special_requests (str, optional)\n\n### 2.5 templates/my_reservations.html\n- Page Title: My Reservations\n- Element IDs:\n  - my-reservations-page (div): Main container\n  - reservations-table (table): Display reservation list with date, time, party_size, status\n  - cancel-reservation-button-{{ reservation_id }} (button): Cancel button\n  - back-to-dashboard (button): Navigate to 'dashboard'\n- Context Variables:\n  - reservations (list of dict)\n\n### 2.6 templates/waitlist.html\n- Page Title: Waitlist\n- Element IDs:\n  - waitlist-page (div): Main container\n  - waitlist-party-size (select): Dropdown for party size to join waitlist\n  - join-waitlist-button (button): Join waitlist submit\n  - user-position (div): Display user's current waitlist position\n  - back-to-dashboard (button): Navigate to 'dashboard'\n- Context Variables:\n  - waitlist_position (int or None)\n- POST Form Fields:\n  - party_size (int)\n\n### 2.7 templates/my_reviews.html\n- Page Title: My Reviews\n- Element IDs:\n  - reviews-page (div): Container\n  - reviews-list (div): List of reviews\n  - write-new-review-button (button): Navigate to 'write_review'\n  - back-to-dashboard (button): Navigate to 'dashboard'\n- Context Variables:\n  - reviews (list of dict with keys review_id (int), dish_name (str), rating (int), review_text (str))\n\n### 2.8 templates/write_review.html\n- Page Title: Write Review\n- Element IDs:\n  - write-review-page (div): Container\n  - select-dish (select): Dropdown of dishes\n  - rating-input (select): Rating dropdown 1-5 stars\n  - review-text (textarea): Review text area\n  - submit-review-button (button): Submit review\n  - back-to-reviews (button): Navigate to 'my_reviews'\n- Context Variables:\n  - menus (list of dict)\n- POST Form Fields:\n  - dish_id (int)\n  - rating (int)\n  - review_text (str)\n\n### 2.9 templates/profile.html\n- Page Title: My Profile\n- Element IDs:\n  - profile-page (div): Container\n  - profile-username (div): Display username (not editable)\n  - profile-email (input text): Editable email input\n  - profile-phone (input text): Editable phone input\n  - update-profile-button (button): Save profile changes\n  - back-to-dashboard (button): Navigate to 'dashboard'\n- Context Variables:\n  - user_profile (dict with keys username (str), email (str), phone (str))\n- POST Form Fields:\n  - email (str)\n  - phone (str)\n\n---\n\n## 3. Data File Schemas\n\n### 3.1 users.txt\n- Relative Path: data/users.txt\n- Format: username|email|phone|full_name\n- Description: Stores user profile data.\n- Fields:\n  - username (string): Unique user identifier.\n  - email (string): User email address.\n  - phone (string): User phone number.\n  - full_name (string): Full user name.\n- Example Rows:\n  ```\njohn_diner|john@example.com|555-1234|John Diner\njane_food|jane@example.com|555-5678|Jane Foodie\n```\n\n### 3.2 menu.txt\n- Relative Path: data/menu.txt\n- Format: dish_id|name|category|price|description|ingredients|dietary|avg_rating\n- Description: Contains all menu dishes and details.\n- Fields:\n  - dish_id (int): Unique dish identifier.\n  - name (string): Dish name.\n  - category (string): Dish category.\n  - price (float): Dish price.\n  - description (string): Description of dish.\n  - ingredients (string): Comma separated list of ingredients.\n  - dietary (string): Dietary information (e.g. Vegetarian, Vegan).\n  - avg_rating (float): Average rating.\n- Example Rows:\n  ```\n1|Caesar Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh romaine lettuce with caesar dressing|Romaine,Parmesan,Croutons,Dressing|Vegetarian|4.5\n2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh Atlantic salmon grilled to perfection|Salmon,Lemon,Herbs,Vegetables|Gluten-Free|4.8\n3|Chocolate Lava Cake|Desserts|7.99|Warm chocolate cake with molten center|Chocolate,Flour,Eggs,Sugar|Vegetarian|4.9\n4|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium Japanese green tea|Green Tea Leaves,Water|Vegan|4.6\n```\n\n### 3.3 reservations.txt\n- Relative Path: data/reservations.txt\n- Format: reservation_id|username|guest_name|phone|email|party_size|date|time|special_requests|status\n- Description: Stores reservations made by users.\n- Fields:\n  - reservation_id (int): Unique reservation identifier.\n  - username (string): Username who made the reservation.\n  - guest_name (string): Name of guest.\n  - phone (string): Phone number.\n  - email (string): Email address.\n  - party_size (int): Number of guests.\n  - date (string, YYYY-MM-DD): Reservation date.\n  - time (string, HH:MM): Reservation time.\n  - special_requests (string): Special requests.\n  - status (string): Reservation status (Upcoming, Completed, Cancelled).\n- Example Rows:\n  ```\n1|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|4|2024-12-01|18:00|Window seat please|Upcoming\n2|jane_food|Jane Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed\n3|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming\n```\n\n### 3.4 waitlist.txt\n- Relative Path: data/waitlist.txt\n- Format: waitlist_id|username|party_size|join_time|status\n- Description: Stores active and removed waitlist entries.\n- Fields:\n  - waitlist_id (int): Unique waitlist entry ID.\n  - username (string): Username on waitlist.\n  - party_size (int): Number of guests.\n  - join_time (string, YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS): Timestamp when joined.\n  - status (string): Status, e.g. Active, Removed.\n- Example Rows:\n  ```\n1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:30:00|Active\n2|jane_food|4|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active\n```\n\n### 3.5 reviews.txt\n- Relative Path: data/reviews.txt\n- Format: review_id|username|dish_id|rating|review_text|review_date\n- Description: Stores user reviews for dishes.\n- Fields:\n  - review_id (int): Unique review identifier.\n  - username (string): Username who wrote the review.\n  - dish_id (int): ID of dish reviewed.\n  - rating (int): Rating (1-5 stars).\n  - review_text (string): The review text.\n  - review_date (string, YYYY-MM-DD): Date of review.\n- Example Rows:\n  ```\n1|jane_food|2|5|Best salmon I've ever had!|2024-11-21\n2|john_diner|3|5|Absolutely divine dessert!|2024-11-20\n3|jane_food|1|4|Fresh and tasty, but dressing could be creamier.|2024-11-19\n```\n\n---\n\n# End of Design Specification\n"})

  [user_task_description] # Requirements Document for 'RestaurantReservation' Web Application  ## 1. Objective Develop a comprehensive web application named 'RestaurantReservation' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse restaurant menus, make table reservations, write reviews, check waitlist status, and manage their dining history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.  ## 2. Language The required development language for the 'RestaurantReservation' application is Python.  ## 3. Page Design  The 'RestaurantReservation' web application will consist of the following nine pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: Restaurant Dashboard - **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured dishes, upcoming reservations, and navigation to other functionalities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.   - **ID: make-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to reservation page.   - **ID: view-menu-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to menu page.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to refresh dashboard.   - **ID: my-reservations-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reservations page.   - **ID: my-reviews-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my reviews page.   - **ID: waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to waitlist page.   - **ID: profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to user profile page.  ### 2. Menu Page - **Page Title**: Restaurant Menu - **Overview**: A page displaying the restaurant menu with categories and filtering. - **Elements**:   - **ID: menu-page** - Type: Div - Container for the menu page.   - **ID: menu-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying dish cards with image, name, price, description.   - **ID: view-dish-button-{dish_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view dish details (each card has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 3. Dish Details Page - **Page Title**: Dish Details - **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific dish. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dish-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dish details page.   - **ID: dish-name** - Type: H1 - Display dish name.   - **ID: dish-price** - Type: Div - Display dish price.   - **ID: back-to-menu** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to menu.  ### 4. Make Reservation Page - **Page Title**: Make Reservation - **Overview**: A page for users to make a table reservation. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reservation-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservation page.   - **ID: guest-name** - Type: Input - Field to input guest name.   - **ID: party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size (1-10).   - **ID: reservation-date** - Type: Input (date) - Field to select reservation date.   - **ID: submit-reservation-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit reservation.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 5. My Reservations Page - **Page Title**: My Reservations - **Overview**: A page displaying all reservations made by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: my-reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my reservations page.   - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reservations with date, time, party size, status.   - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each upcoming reservation has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 6. Waitlist Page - **Page Title**: Waitlist - **Overview**: A page for users to join the waitlist and check their position. - **Elements**:   - **ID: waitlist-page** - Type: Div - Container for the waitlist page.   - **ID: waitlist-party-size** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select party size.   - **ID: join-waitlist-button** - Type: Button - Button to join waitlist.   - **ID: user-position** - Type: Div - Display user's current position in waitlist.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 7. My Reviews Page - **Page Title**: My Reviews - **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.   - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with dish name, rating, review text.   - **ID: write-new-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Write Review Page - **Page Title**: Write Review - **Overview**: A page for users to write a review for a dish. - **Elements**:   - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.   - **ID: select-dish** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select dish to review.   - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).   - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.   - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.   - **ID: back-to-reviews** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to my reviews.  ### 9. User Profile Page - **Page Title**: My Profile - **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information. - **Elements**:   - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.   - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).   - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.   - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'RestaurantReservation' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. User Data - **File Name**: `users.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   username|email|phone|full_name   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   john_diner|john@example.com|555-1234|John Diner   jane_food|jane@example.com|555-5678|Jane Foodie   ```  ### 2. Menu Items Data - **File Name**: `menu.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   dish_id|name|category|price|description|ingredients|dietary|avg_rating   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Caesar Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh romaine lettuce with caesar dressing|Romaine,Parmesan,Croutons,Dressing|Vegetarian|4.5   2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh Atlantic salmon grilled to perfection|Salmon,Lemon,Herbs,Vegetables|Gluten-Free|4.8   3|Chocolate Lava Cake|Desserts|7.99|Warm chocolate cake with molten center|Chocolate,Flour,Eggs,Sugar|Vegetarian|4.9   4|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium Japanese green tea|Green Tea Leaves,Water|Vegan|4.6   ```  ### 3. Reservations Data - **File Name**: `reservations.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   reservation_id|username|guest_name|phone|email|party_size|date|time|special_requests|status   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|4|2024-12-01|18:00|Window seat please|Upcoming   2|jane_food|Jane Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed   3|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming   ```  ### 4. Waitlist Data - **File Name**: `waitlist.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   waitlist_id|username|party_size|join_time|status   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:30:00|Active   2|jane_food|4|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active   ```  ### 5. Reviews Data - **File Name**: `reviews.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   review_id|username|dish_id|rating|review_text|review_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|jane_food|2|5|Best salmon I've ever had!|2024-11-21   2|john_diner|3|5|Absolutely divine dessert!|2024-11-20   3|jane_food|1|4|Fresh and tasty, but dressing could be creamier.|2024-11-19   ```  All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.

Flask Routes Specification  | URL Path                 | Function Name           | HTTP Method(s) | Template File Rendered             | Context Variables Passed to Template                         | Request Form Fields Expected (POST)                      | |--------------------------|-------------------------|----------------|----------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------| | /                        | root_redirect           | GET            | None (redirect 302 to /dashboard) | None                                                        | None                                                     | | /dashboard               | dashboard               | GET            | dashboard.html                   | username (str), featured_dishes (list of dict), upcoming_reservations (list of dict) | None                                                     | | /menu                    | menu_page               | GET            | menu.html                       | menus (list of dict)                                         | None                                                     | | /menu/<int:dish_id>      | dish_details            | GET            | dish_details.html               | dish (dict)                                                | None                                                     | | /make_reservation        | make_reservation        | GET, POST       | make_reservation.html           | None (GET), errors (dict) (POST failure)                   | guest_name (str), party_size (int), reservation_date (str), special_requests (str - optional) | | /my_reservations         | my_reservations         | GET            | my_reservations.html            | reservations (list of dict)                                 | None                                                     | | /cancel_reservation      | cancel_reservation      | POST           | None (redirect to /my_reservations) | None                                                     | reservation_id (int)                                      | | /waitlist                | waitlist_page           | GET, POST       | waitlist.html                   | waitlist_position (int or None)                           | party_size (int)                                         | | /my_reviews              | my_reviews              | GET            | my_reviews.html                 | reviews (list of dict)                                     | None                                                     | | /write_review            | write_review            | GET, POST       | write_review.html               | menus (list of dict) (GET)                                 | dish_id (int), rating (int), review_text (str)           | | /profile                 | profile                 | GET, POST       | profile.html                   | user_profile (dict)                                       | email (str), phone (str)                                 |  ---  ## 2. username (str)   - featured_dishes (list of dict)   - upcoming_reservations (list of dict)  ### 2.2 templates/menu.html - Page Title: Restaurant Menu - Element IDs:   - menu-page (div): Main container   - menu-grid (div): Grid of dish cards   - view-dish-button-{{ dish_id }} (button): Button to view dish details   - back-to-dashboard (button): Navigates to 'dashboard' - Context Variables:   - menus (list of dict with keys: dish_id (int), name (str), category (str), price (float), description (str))  ### 2.3 templates/dish_details.html - dish (dict with fields name (str), price (float), description (str))  ### 2.4 templates/make_reservation.html - Page Title: Make Reservation - Element IDs:   - reservation-page (div): Main container   - back-to-dashboard (button): Navigate to 'dashboard' - Context Variables:   - errors (dict) (optional, if POST validation fails) - POST Form Fields:   - guest_name (str)   - party_size (int)   - reservation_date (str)   - special_requests (str, optional)  ### 2.5 templates/my_reservations.html - Page Title: My Reservations - Element IDs:   - my-reservations-page (div): Main container   - reservations-table (table): Display reservation list with date, time, party_size, status   - dietary (string): Dietary information (e.g. Vegetarian, Vegan).   - avg_rating (float): Average rating. - Example Rows:   ``` 1|Caesar Salad|Appetizers|8.99|Fresh romaine lettuce with caesar dressing|Romaine,Parmesan,Croutons,Dressing|Vegetarian|4.5 2|Grilled Salmon|Main Course|24.99|Fresh Atlantic salmon grilled to perfection|Salmon,Lemon,Herbs,Vegetables|Gluten-Free|4.8 3|Chocolate Lava Cake|Desserts|7.99|Warm chocolate cake with molten center|Chocolate,Flour,Eggs,Sugar|Vegetarian|4.9 4|Green Tea|Beverages|3.99|Premium Japanese green tea|Green Tea Leaves,Water|Vegan|4.6 ```  ### 3.3 reservations.txt - party_size (int): Number of guests.   - date (string, YYYY-MM-DD): Reservation date.   - time (string, HH:MM): Reservation time.   - special_requests (string): Special requests.   - status (string): Reservation status (Upcoming, Completed, Cancelled). - Example Rows:   ``` 1|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|4|2024-12-01|18:00|Window seat please|Upcoming 2|jane_food|Jane Foodie|555-5678|jane@example.com|2|2024-11-20|19:30|Anniversary dinner|Completed 3|john_diner|John Diner|555-1234|john@example.com|6|2024-12-05|20:00||Upcoming ```  ### 3.4 waitlist.txt - username (string): Username on waitlist.   - party_size (int): Number of guests.   - join_time (string, YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS): Timestamp when joined.   - status (string): Status, e.g. Active, Removed. - Example Rows:   ``` 1|john_diner|2|2024-11-22 18:30:00|Active 2|jane_food|4|2024-11-22 18:45:00|Active ```  ### 3.5 reviews.txt - Relative Path: data/reviews.txt - Format: review_id|username|dish_id|rating|review_text|review_date - Description: Stores user reviews for dishes. - Fields:   - review_id (int): Unique review identifier.   - username (string): Username who wrote the review.   - dish_id (int): ID of dish reviewed.   - rating (int): Rating (1-5 stars).   - review_text (string): The review text.   - review_date (string, YYYY-MM-DD): Date of review. - Example Rows:   ``` 1|jane_food|2|5|Best salmon I've ever had!|2024-11-21 2|john_diner|3|5|Absolutely divine dessert!|2024-11-20 3|jane_food|1|4|Fresh and tasty, but dressing could be creamier.|2024-11-19 ```  ---  # End of Design Specification
